name: Daibiru Corporation
summary: Daibiru Corporation, together with its subsidiaries, owns, operates, manages, and leases real estate properties in Japan. It owns and leases 30 properties for offices, hotel buildings, and retail complexes in central Tokyo, Osaka, and Sapporo. The company also leases residence halls for students; and apartment buildings for business people on temporary assignment, as well as condominiums for families. In addition, it offers facility management services; and real estate agency services for office properties, as well as engages in construction works relating to buildings, such as repairs originating from its building maintenance operations. The company was formerly known as Osaka Tatemono Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Daibiru Corporation in January 1992. The company was founded in 1923 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan. Daibiru Corporation is a subsidiary of Mitsui O.S.K. Lines, Ltd.
